title: Tapu Totems [Cobblemon]
description: Mod that simply adds 4 items to summon all Tapu's!
body:
How to craft the totems: 

![Tapu Koko totem recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c73c5fd31d612af4145a036b849b66d196c85b9.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/696365c9756921a03878f3f57579d7fb217e6a98.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04b9e7934d4811448b86df2bc4a4e4debf50af41.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e575c411eb40bcf8d433fa4e5e7c148099659c.png)

This mod adds 4 craftable totems to summon the Alolan Guardians. Just right-click with a totem in your hand to summon Tapu Koko, Lele, Bulu, or Fini at level 75 instantly. Craft, click, and battle!

_Note: This mod doesn't include the Pokémon models. If you don't have them, I recommend installing [this](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy)._
